## Holding

Name the company or asset.

## Reason For Update

Describe what changed and why the thesis needs revision.

## Sections To Review

Identify which thesis sections should be revisited.

## Decision Relevance

Explain whether this may affect holding, sizing, or watch status.

## Related Documents

List linked research, dashboard, or decision log items.
